ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sampling_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sampling event */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the sampling took place */,
  "sample_round" INTEGER /* Number of the sample round */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sampling event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the sampling event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the sampling event */,
  "net_pan" TEXT /* Method of data collection (net or pan) */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collector who conducted the sampling */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sampling event */,
  "weather_conditions_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather conditions associated with the event */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used in the event */,
  "notes_id" INTEGER /* ID of the notes associated with the event */,
  "data_file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file associated with the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sampling event (e.g., planned, in progress, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sampling_events_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES collectors ("collector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sampling_events_data_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sampling_events_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sampling_events_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sampling_events_weather_conditions_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_conditions_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_conditions_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sampling_events_notes_id FOREIGN KEY ("notes_id") REFERENCES notes ("note_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., forest, desert, urban) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the site information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collectors" (
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collector */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the collector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the collector */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the collector belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the collector */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role within the department */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the collector's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nets" (
  "net_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each net */,
  "net_number" INTEGER /* Number of the net */,
  "net_type" TEXT /* Type of the net (e.g., standard, specialized) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the net */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material the net is made of */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the net */,
  "last_inspected" TEXT /* Date when the net was last inspected */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the net (e.g., available, in use, damaged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("net_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pans" (
  "pan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pan */,
  "pan_number" INTEGER /* Number of the pan */,
  "pan_type" TEXT /* Type of the pan (e.g., standard, specialized) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pan */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material the pan is made of */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the pan */,
  "last_inspected" TEXT /* Date when the pan was last inspected */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the pan (e.g., available, in use, damaged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of environmental conditions */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sampling event */,
  "temp_start" REAL /* Starting temperature (in degrees Celsius) */,
  "temp_end" REAL /* Ending temperature (in degrees Celsius) */,
  "wind_start" REAL /* Starting wind speed (in meters per second) */,
  "wind_end" REAL /* Ending wind speed (in meters per second) */,
  "sky_start" TEXT /* Starting sky condition (e.g., clear, cloudy) */,
  "sky_end" TEXT /* Ending sky condition (e.g., clear, cloudy) */,
  "humidity_start" REAL /* Starting humidity (in percentage) */,
  "humidity_end" REAL /* Ending humidity (in percentage) */,
  "atmospheric_pressure_start" REAL /* Starting atmospheric pressure (in hPa) */,
  "atmospheric_pressure_end" REAL /* Ending atmospheric pressure (in hPa) */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation during the sampling event (in mm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_conditions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES sampling_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sampling event being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the event was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES sampling_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sampling event the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the data file */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES sampling_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sampling event the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note or remark */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of the note (e.g., observation, issue, recommendation) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES sampling_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user granted the permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the permission */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who assigned the permission */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was assigned */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_conditions_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of weather conditions */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sampling event */,
  "temp_start" REAL /* Starting temperature (in degrees Celsius) */,
  "temp_end" REAL /* Ending temperature (in degrees Celsius) */,
  "wind_start" REAL /* Starting wind speed (in meters per second) */,
  "wind_end" REAL /* Ending wind speed (in meters per second) */,
  "sky_start" TEXT /* Starting sky condition (e.g., clear, cloudy) */,
  "sky_end" TEXT /* Ending sky condition (e.g., clear, cloudy) */,
  "humidity_start" REAL /* Starting humidity (in percentage) */,
  "humidity_end" REAL /* Ending humidity (in percentage) */,
  "atmospheric_pressure_start" REAL /* Starting atmospheric pressure (in hPa) */,
  "atmospheric_pressure_end" REAL /* Ending atmospheric pressure (in hPa) */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation during the sampling event (in mm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_conditions_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment (e.g., net, pan) */,
  "equipment_description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "last_inspected" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was last inspected */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the equipment (e.g., available, in use, damaged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)
